title: rollback git branch per goal slice
purpose: G6.1 defines rollback git branch per goal slice for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake.
scope: Owns `G6.1` only; siblings under `G6` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §9 — Branch G — Verification & quality plane (anti-mistake)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#9-branch-g-verification-quality-plane-anti-mistake).
behavior_steps: At H1, when the operator supplies a spec or charter, the conductor anchors pursuit in `state.json` with north star, scope, and the minimal HITL contract ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md): H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off).

After H1 approval, [goal autopilot](A3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) drives pursuit until `goal_verify` passes or a hard stop from [A4](A4.1-stop-human-h1-h2-h3.md) fires—not when a chat session or token burst ends.

On each wake, [B1.1](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) runs before improvisation while the conductor executes one product pipeline step and peeks the platform promotion queue so scripts, playbooks, and checks discovered during delivery enqueue without pausing the active goal.
When template-packs compose a company slice, roles, pipelines, and verification inherit catalog composition and the three structural shifts from this summary instead of reinventing setup per project.
When scope or stop behavior is ambiguous, agents resolve conflicts using this executive summary before inventing new policy; unresolved contradictions escalate to H2 and fail closed.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Flaky test â€” escalation S4 once, then H2 with evidence log; no silent retry loop.
Edge case `G6.1` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `G6.1`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Extend verify-router for goal-level suite invocation.
Wire CI: validate-workflow checks goal block when pursuit.mode=goal_autopilot.
Validate `G6.1` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `G6.1` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `G6.1`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: G6.1 defines rollback git branch per goal slice for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake. In practice, the system at h1, when the operator supplies a spec or charter, the conductor anchors pursuit in `state.json` with north star, scope, and the minimal hitl contract ([intro-1.2](intro-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md): h1 plan, h2 blocker, h3 sign-off), then after h1 approval, [goal autopilot](a3.2-goal-autopilot-until-goal-verify-or-hard-block.md) drives pursuit until `goal_verify` passes or a hard stop from [a4](a4.1-stop-human-h1-h2-h3.md) fires—not when a chat session or token burst ends.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-g 2026-06-28 -->

Rollback at the git layer uses a branch per goal slice so failed pursue paths can revert without contaminating main or sibling goals. Git-workflow creates and tracks feature branches; goal completion merges only after goal verify and gates clear.

Operator-initiated rollback checks out the last known-good branch tip for that slice; conductor records branch name in journal handoff. Multi-goal company autopilot ([A3.3](A3.3-company-autopilot-multi-goal-role-workstreams.md)) isolates slices to limit blast radius.
